item.title: 15块实现笔记本外接显卡？？旧电脑也能爽玩黑神话悟空?！【翼王工作室】
item.itunes:title: 15块实现笔记本外接显卡？？旧电脑也能爽玩黑神话悟空?！【翼王工作室】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8wZ1V3CM6Rg 2024年了，外接显卡到底发展到什么程度了呢？那些旧笔记本电脑，是可以改装，改装后性能会如何，是否能仅升级显卡就可以畅玩黑悟空呢？这次我们就来研究一下各种转接显卡的方案。 显卡43报错补丁： 通过百度网盘分享的文件：nvidia-e....zip 链接：https://pan.baidu.com/s/1GIWfu205keI-C_UvB0IEeg?pwd=1236 提取码：1236 复制这段内容打开「百度网盘APP 即可获取」 BGM： Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow Cloudy by KODOMOi https://soundcloud.com/kodomoimusic Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/ZIyyj2FrVI0 Song: Ikson - We Are Free (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/8hSZZ9um0aM Paraclet by Amarià https://soundcloud.com/amariamusique Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/lSguSF985Y4 New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Let's Change The World Together by Artificial.Music https://soundcloud.com/artificial-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/RaJ7rUEkj_4
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8wZ1V3CM6Rg 2024年了，外接显卡到底发展到什么程度了呢？那些旧笔记本电脑，是可以改装，改装后性能会如何，是否能仅升级显卡就可以畅玩黑悟空呢？这次我们就来研究一下各种转接显卡的方案。 显卡43报错补丁： 通过百度网盘分享的文件：nvidia-e....zip 链接：https://pan.baidu.com/s/1GIWfu205keI-C_UvB0IEeg?pwd=1236 提取码：1236 复制这段内容打开「百度网盘APP 即可获取」 BGM： Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow Cloudy by KODOMOi https://soundcloud.com/kodomoimusic Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/ZIyyj2FrVI0 Song: Ikson - We Are Free (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/8hSZZ9um0aM Paraclet by Amarià https://soundcloud.com/amariamusique Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/lSguSF985Y4 New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Let's Change The World Together by Artificial.Music https://soundcloud.com/artificial-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/RaJ7rUEkj_4
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=8wZ1V3CM6Rg 2024年了，外接显卡到底发展到什么程度了呢？那些旧笔记本电脑，是可以改装，改装后性能会如何，是否能仅升级显卡就可以畅玩黑悟空呢？这次我们就来研究一下各种转接显卡的方案。 显卡43报错补丁： 通过百度网盘分享的文件：nvidia-e....zip 链接：https://pan.baidu.com/s/1GIWfu205keI-C_UvB0IEeg?pwd=1236 提取码：1236 复制这段内容打开「百度网盘APP 即可获取」 BGM： Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow Cloudy by KODOMOi https://soundcloud.com/kodomoimusic Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/ZIyyj2FrVI0 Song: Ikson - We Are Free (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/8hSZZ9um0aM Paraclet by Amarià https://soundcloud.com/amariamusique Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/lSguSF985Y4 New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Let's Change The World Together by Artificial.Music https://soundcloud.com/artificial-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/RaJ7rUEkj_4

item.title: 我在水冷头上打赢了虎先锋！钛钽新水冷LG700 PRO上手评测【翼王】
item.itunes:title: 我在水冷头上打赢了虎先锋！钛钽新水冷LG700 PRO上手评测【翼王】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2TLk5d6Xt-w 这次我们要来上手评测一下钛钽TCOMAS的带屏幕的新水冷产品，LG-700 PRO。 BGM： Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U

Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=2TLk5d6Xt-w 这次我们要来上手评测一下钛钽TCOMAS的带屏幕的新水冷产品，LG-700 PRO。 BGM： Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. item.title: 便宜SFX电源能买吗？性价比650W SFX电源大横评【翼王】
item.itunes:title: 便宜SFX电源能买吗？性价比650W SFX电源大横评【翼王】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MnqOeK7I8q4 因为各种原因SFX电源的价格一直高高在上，对于很多ITX玩家来说，便宜的SFX电源是比较迫切的需求，所以这次我们带来了一期650W性价比SFX电源的横评视频。 BGM: Track: Introspection — Mona Wonderlick [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/UZzuVt7nKOA Free Download / Stream: http://alplus.io/Introspection Song: LiQWYD - Free Music provided by LiQWYD. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/flpBtykbMJc Song: Justhea - Vibe Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/apg79FNFkz4 Song: Sappheiros - Lights Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/dfL3jM6Pt_4 Song: Sappheiros - You Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/E30pRP_sdAY Song: Ikson - Sunny (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/AoVFxsFvD5o Song: Ikson - Spring (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/xSZU2XMUAYY Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MnqOeK7I8q4 因为各种原因SFX电源的价格一直高高在上，对于很多ITX玩家来说，便宜的SFX电源是比较迫切的需求，所以这次我们带来了一期650W性价比SFX电源的横评视频。 BGM: Track: Introspection — Mona Wonderlick [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/UZzuVt7nKOA Free Download / Stream: http://alplus.io/Introspection Song: LiQWYD - Free Music provided by LiQWYD. Video Link: https://youtu.be/AoVFxsFvD5o Song: Ikson - Spring (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/xSZU2XMUAYY Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=MnqOeK7I8q4 因为各种原因SFX电源的价格一直高高在上，对于很多ITX玩家来说，便宜的SFX电源是比较迫切的需求，所以这次我们带来了一期650W性价比SFX电源的横评视频。 BGM: Track: Introspection — Mona Wonderlick [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/UZzuVt7nKOA Free Download / Stream: http://alplus.io/Introspection Song: LiQWYD - Free Music provided by LiQWYD. item.title: 槽点爆满?! PDD上超便宜的双触屏笔记本电脑开箱试玩【开箱翼闻录 第55期】
item.itunes:title: 槽点爆满?! PDD上超便宜的双触屏笔记本电脑开箱试玩【开箱翼闻录 第55期】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kl4YXHbq9Zo 刷PDD时被推送了一台只要2000出头的双屏幕笔记本 ，而且还是双触摸屏，看了一下详情页感觉槽点满满，就买回来开箱看看了。 BGM： Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kl4YXHbq9Zo 刷PDD时被推送了一台只要2000出头的双屏幕笔记本 ，而且还是双触摸屏，看了一下详情页感觉槽点满满，就买回来开箱看看了。 BGM： Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA
item.content:encoded: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=kl4YXHbq9Zo 刷PDD时被推送了一台只要2000出头的双屏幕笔记本 ，而且还是双触摸屏，看了一下详情页感觉槽点满满，就买回来开箱看看了。 BGM： Song: Peyruis - Neutral Bay (Vlog No Copyright Music) Music promoted by Vlog No Copyright Music. Video Link: https://youtu.be/CNBV015NL3U Mango by Smith The Mister https://smiththemister.bandcamp.com Smith The Mister https://bit.ly/Smith-The-Mister-YT Free Download / Stream: https://bit.ly/mango-smith-the-mister Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/Zn4SeyT3oME Finesse by Peyruis https://soundcloud.com/peyruis Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/UaE_gaaLQYA

item.title: ¥599 ATX3 1000W 10年保修？超卷的九州风神黄金统治者PQ-1000G电源拆解评测【翼王】
item.itunes:title: ¥599 ATX3 1000W 10年保修？超卷的九州风神黄金统治者PQ-1000G电源拆解评测【翼王】
item.itunes:author: 翼王
item.itunes:summary: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6R4QmirVDe4 这一次我们来上手评测一下看起来性价比爆高的九州风神的PQ-G系列——黄金统治者电源。 BGM： Let's Change The World Together by Artificial.Music https://soundcloud.com/artificial-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/RaJ7rUEkj_4 Paraclet by Amarià https://soundcloud.com/amariamusique Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/lSguSF985Y4 Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Song: Atch - Found You Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music. Creative Commons - Attribution 3.0 Unported Video Link: https://youtu.be/G774NKvUm88
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=6R4QmirVDe4 这一次我们来上手评测一下看起来性价比爆高的九州风神的PQ-G系列——黄金统治者电源。 BGM： Let's Change The World Together by Artificial.Music https://soundcloud.com/artificial-music Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/RaJ7rUEkj_4 Paraclet by Amarià https://soundcloud.com/amariamusique Creative Commons — Attribution 3.0 Unported — CC BY 3.0 https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by/3.0/ Music promoted by Audio Library https://youtu.be/lSguSF985Y4 Track: Tropical Flow — BraveLion [Audio Library Release] Music provided by Audio Library Plus Watch: https://youtu.be/KGAMxmrh-Fw Free Download / Stream: https://alplus.io/tropical-flow New Start! by Pikasonic https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=aV6Q98VIcH4 Presented by EDM Royalty Free - Music For Content Creators Licensed under Creative Common License Song: Atch - Found You Music provided by Vlog No Copyright Music.
